Genesis1:1 In the beginning God created the heaven and the earth.
Genesis1:2 And the earth was without form
Genesis1:3 And God said
Genesis1:4 And God saw the light
Genesis1:5 And God called the light Day
Genesis1:6 And God said
Genesis1:7 And God made the firmament
Genesis1:8 And God called the firmament Heaven. And the evening and the morning were the second day.
Genesis1:9 And God said
Genesis1:10 And God called the dry land Earth; and the gathering together of the waters called he Seas: and God saw that it was good.
Genesis1:11 And God said
Genesis1:12 And the earth brought forth grass
Genesis1:13 And the evening and the morning were the third day.
Genesis1:14 And God said
Genesis1:15 And let them be for lights in the firmament of the heaven to give light upon the earth: and it was so.
Genesis1:16 And God made two great lights; the greater light to rule the day
Genesis1:17 And God set them in the firmament of the heaven to give light upon the earth
Genesis1:18 And to rule over the day and over the night
Genesis1:19 And the evening and the morning were the fourth day.
Genesis1:20 And God said
Genesis1:21 And God created great whales
Genesis1:22 And God blessed them
Genesis1:23 And the evening and the morning were the fifth day.
Genesis1:24 And God said
Genesis1:25 And God made the beast of the earth after his kind
Genesis1:26 And God said
Genesis1:27 So God created man in his own image
Genesis1:28 And God blessed them
Genesis1:29 And God said
Genesis1:30 And to every beast of the earth
Genesis1:31 And God saw every thing that he had made
Genesis2:1 Thus the heavens and the earth were finished
Genesis2:2 And on the seventh day God ended his work which he had made; and he rested on the seventh day from all his work which he had made.
Genesis2:3 And God blessed the seventh day
Genesis2:4 These are the generations of the heavens and of the earth when they were created
Genesis2:5 And every plant of the field before it was in the earth
Genesis2:6 But there went up a mist from the earth
Genesis2:7 And the LORD God formed man of the dust of the ground
Genesis2:8 And the LORD God planted a garden eastward in Eden; and there he put the man whom he had formed.
Genesis2:9 And out of the ground made the LORD God to grow every tree that is pleasant to the sight
Genesis2:10 And a river went out of Eden to water the garden; and from thence it was parted
Genesis2:11 The name of the first is Pison: that is it which compasseth the whole land of Havilah
Genesis2:12 And the gold of that land is good: there is bdellium and the onyx stone.
Genesis2:13 And the name of the second river is Gihon: the same is it that compasseth the whole land of Ethiopia.
Genesis2:14 And the name of the third river is Hiddekel: that is it which goeth toward the east of Assyria. And the fourth river is Euphrates.

Genesis2:16 And the LORD God commanded the man

Genesis2:18 And the LORD God said

Genesis2:22 And the rib
Genesis2:23 And Adam said

Genesis2:25 And they were both naked

Genesis3:7 And the eyes of them both were opened

Genesis5:1 This is the book of the generations of Adam. In the day that God created man
Genesis5:2 Male and female created he them; and blessed them
Genesis5:3 And Adam lived an hundred and thirty years
Genesis5:4 And the days of Adam after he had begotten Seth were eight hundred years: and he begat sons and daughters:
Genesis5:5 And all the days that Adam lived were nine hundred and thirty years: and he died.
Genesis5:6 And Seth lived an hundred and five years
Genesis5:7 And Seth lived after he begat Enos eight hundred and seven years
Genesis5:8 And all the days of Seth were nine hundred and twelve years: and he died.
Genesis5:9 And Enos lived ninety years
Genesis5:10 And Enos lived after he begat Cainan eight hundred and fifteen years
Genesis5:11 And all the days of Enos were nine hundred and five years: and he died.
Genesis5:12 And Cainan lived seventy years and begat Mahalaleel:
Genesis5:13 And Cainan lived after he begat Mahalaleel eight hundred and forty years
Genesis5:14 And all the days of Cainan were nine hundred and ten years: and he died.
Genesis5:15 And Mahalaleel lived sixty and five years
Genesis5:16 And Mahalaleel lived after he begat Jared eight hundred and thirty years
Genesis5:17 And all the days of Mahalaleel were eight hundred ninety and five years: and he died.
Genesis5:18 And Jared lived an hundred sixty and two years
Genesis5:19 And Jared lived after he begat Enoch eight hundred years
Genesis5:20 And all the days of Jared were nine hundred sixty and two years: and he died.
Genesis5:21 And Enoch lived sixty and five years
Genesis5:22 And Enoch walked with God after he begat Methuselah three hundred years
Genesis5:23 And all the days of Enoch were three hundred sixty and five years:
Genesis5:24 And Enoch walked with God: and he was not; for God took him.
Genesis5:25 And Methuselah lived an hundred eighty and seven years
Genesis5:26 And Methuselah lived after he begat Lamech seven hundred eighty and two years
Genesis5:27 And all the days of Methuselah were nine hundred sixty and nine years: and he died.
Genesis5:28 And Lamech lived an hundred eighty and two years
Genesis5:29 And he called his name Noah
Genesis5:30 And Lamech lived after he begat Noah five hundred ninety and five years
Genesis5:31 And all the days of Lamech were seven hundred seventy and seven years: and he died.
Genesis5:32 And Noah was five hundred years old: and Noah begat Shem

Exodus29:8 And thou shalt bring his sons
Exodus29:9 And thou shalt gird them with girdles
Exodus29:10 And thou shalt cause a bullock to be brought before the tabernacle of the congregation: and Aaron and his sons shall put their hands upon the head of the bullock.
Exodus29:11 And thou shalt kill the bullock before the LORD
Exodus29:12 And thou shalt take of the blood of the bullock
Exodus29:13 And thou shalt take all the fat that covereth the inwards
Exodus29:14 But the flesh of the bullock
Exodus29:15 Thou shalt also take one ram; and Aaron and his sons shall put their hands upon the head of the ram.
Exodus29:16 And thou shalt slay the ram
Exodus29:17 And thou shalt cut the ram in pieces
Exodus29:18 And thou shalt burn the whole ram upon the altar: it is a burnt offering unto the LORD: it is a sweet savor
Exodus29:19 And thou shalt take the other ram; and Aaron and his sons shall put their hands upon the head of the ram.
Exodus29:20 Then shalt thou kill the ram
Exodus29:21 And thou shalt take of the blood that is upon the altar
Exodus29:22 Also thou shalt take of the ram the fat and the rump
Exodus29:23 And one loaf of bread
Exodus29:24 And thou shalt put all in the hands of Aaron
Exodus29:25 And thou shalt receive them of their hands
Exodus29:26 And thou shalt take the breast of the ram of Aaron's consecration
Exodus29:27 And thou shalt sanctify the breast of the wave offering
Exodus29:28 And it shall be Aaron's and his sons' by a statute for ever from the children of Israel: for it is an heave offering: and it shall be an heave offering from the children of Israel of the sacrifice of their peace offerings
Exodus29:29 And the holy garments of Aaron shall be his sons' after him
Exodus29:30 And that son that is priest in his stead shall put them on seven days
Exodus29:31 And thou shalt take the ram of the consecration
Exodus29:32 And Aaron and his sons shall eat the flesh of the ram
Exodus29:33 And they shall eat those things wherewith the atonement was made
Exodus29:34 And if ought of the flesh of the consecrations
Exodus29:35 And thus shalt thou do unto Aaron
Exodus29:36 And thou shalt offer every day a bullock for a sin offering for atonement: and thou shalt cleanse the altar
Exodus29:37 Seven days thou shalt make an atonement for the altar
Exodus29:38 Now this is that which thou shalt offer upon the altar; two lambs of the first year day by day continually.
Exodus29:39 The one lamb thou shalt offer in the morning; and the other lamb thou shalt offer at even:
Exodus29:40 And with the one lamb a tenth deal of flour mingled with the fourth part of an hin of beaten oil; and the fourth part of an hin of wine for a drink offering.
Exodus29:41 And the other lamb thou shalt offer at even
Exodus29:42 This shall be a continual burnt offering throughout your generations at the door of the tabernacle of the congregation before the LORD: where I will meet you
Exodus29:43 And there I will meet with the children of Israel
Exodus29:44 And I will sanctify the tabernacle of the congregation
Exodus29:45 And I will dwell among the children of Israel
Exodus29:46 And they shall know that I am the LORD their God

Leviticus1:1 And the LORD called unto Moses
Leviticus1:2 Speak unto the children of Israel
Leviticus1:3 If his offering be a burnt sacrifice of the herd
Leviticus1:4 And he shall put his hand upon the head of the burnt offering; and it shall be accepted for him to make atonement for him.
Leviticus1:5 And he shall kill the bullock before the LORD: and the priests
Leviticus1:6 And he shall flay the burnt offering
Leviticus1:7 And the sons of Aaron the priest shall put fire upon the altar
Leviticus1:8 And the priests
Leviticus1:9 But his inwards and his legs shall he wash in water: and the priest shall burn all on the altar
Leviticus1:10 And if his offering be of the flocks
Leviticus1:11 And he shall kill it on the side of the altar northward before the LORD: and the priests
Leviticus1:12 And he shall cut it into his pieces
Leviticus1:13 But he shall wash the inwards and the legs with water: and the priest shall bring it all
Leviticus1:14 And if the burnt sacrifice for his offering to the LORD be of fowls
Leviticus1:15 And the priest shall bring it unto the altar
Leviticus1:16 And he shall pluck away his crop with his feathers
Leviticus1:17 And he shall cleave it with the wings thereof
Leviticus2:1 And when any will offer a meat offering unto the LORD
Leviticus2:2 And he shall bring it to Aaron's sons the priests: and he shall take thereout his handful of the flour thereof
Leviticus2:3 And the remnant of the meat offering shall be Aaron's and his sons': it is a thing most holy of the offerings of the LORD made by fire.
Leviticus2:4 And if thou bring an oblation of a meat offering baked in the oven
Leviticus2:5 And if thy oblation be a meat offering baked in a pan
Leviticus2:6 Thou shalt part it in pieces
Leviticus2:7 And if thy oblation be a meat offering baked in the frying pan
Leviticus2:8 And thou shalt bring the meat offering that is made of these things unto the LORD: and when it is presented unto the priest
Leviticus2:9 And the priest shall take from the meat offering a memorial thereof
Leviticus2:10 And that which is left of the meat offering shall be Aaron's and his sons': it is a thing most holy of the offerings of the LORD made by fire.
Leviticus2:11 No meat offering
Leviticus2:12 As for the oblation of the firstfruits
Leviticus2:13 And every oblation of thy meat offering shalt thou season with salt; neither shalt thou suffer the salt of the covenant of thy God to be lacking from thy meat offering: with all thine offerings thou shalt offer salt.
Leviticus2:14 And if thou offer a meat offering of thy firstfruits unto the LORD
Leviticus2:15 And thou shalt put oil upon it
Leviticus2:16 And the priest shall burn the memorial of it

Leviticus3:4 And the two kidneys

Leviticus3:6 And if his offering for a sacrifice of peace offering unto the LORD be of the flock; male or female

Leviticus3:15 And the two kidneys

Leviticus4:1 And the LORD spake unto Moses
Leviticus4:2 Speak unto the children of Israel

Leviticus4:5 And the priest that is anointed shall take of the bullock's blood

Leviticus5:11 But if he be not able to bring two turtledoves

Leviticus5:19 It is a trespass offering: he hath certainly trespassed against the LORD.

Leviticus6:2 If a soul sin
Leviticus6:3 Or have found that which was lost
Leviticus6:4 Then it shall be
Leviticus6:5 Or all that about which he hath sworn falsely; he shall even restore it in the principal
Leviticus6:6 And he shall bring his trespass offering unto the LORD
Leviticus6:7 And the priest shall make an atonement for him before the LORD: and it shall be forgiven him for any thing of all that he hath done in trespassing therein.

Leviticus6:13 The fire shall ever be burning upon the altar; it shall never go out.

Leviticus6:15 And he shall take of it his handful

Leviticus6:17 It shall not be baked with leaven. I have given it unto them for their portion of my offerings made by fire; it is most holy
Leviticus6:18 All the males among the children of Aaron shall eat of it. It shall be a statute for ever in your generations concerning the offerings of the LORD made by fire: every one that toucheth them shall be holy.

Leviticus6:23 For every meat offering for the priest shall be wholly burnt: it shall not be eaten.

Leviticus6:25 Speak unto Aaron and to his sons

Leviticus6:28 But the earthen vessel wherein it is sodden shall be broken: and if it be sodden in a brazen pot
Leviticus6:29 All the males among the priests shall eat thereof: it is most holy.

Leviticus11:1 And the LORD spake unto Moses and to Aaron
Leviticus11:2 Speak unto the children of Israel
Leviticus11:3 Whatsoever parteth the hoof
Leviticus11:4 Nevertheless these shall ye not eat of them that chew the cud
Leviticus11:5 And the coney
Leviticus11:6 And the hare
Leviticus11:7 And the swine
Leviticus11:8 Of their flesh shall ye not eat
Leviticus11:9 These shall ye eat of all that are in the waters: whatsoever hath fins and scales in the waters
Leviticus11:10 And all that have not fins and scales in the seas
Leviticus11:11 They shall be even an abomination unto you; ye shall not eat of their flesh
Leviticus11:12 Whatsoever hath no fins nor scales in the waters
Leviticus11:13 And these are they which ye shall have in abomination among the fowls; they shall not be eaten
Leviticus11:14 And the vulture
Leviticus11:15 Every raven after his kind;
Leviticus11:16 And the owl
Leviticus11:17 And the little owl
Leviticus11:18 And the swan
Leviticus11:19 And the stork
Leviticus11:20 All fowls that creep
Leviticus11:21 Yet these may ye eat of every flying creeping thing that goeth upon all four
Leviticus11:22 Even these of them ye may eat; the locust after his kind
Leviticus11:23 But all other flying creeping things
Leviticus11:24 And for these ye shall be unclean: whosoever toucheth the carcass of them shall be unclean until the even.
Leviticus11:25 And whosoever beareth ought of the carcass of them shall wash his clothes
Leviticus11:26 The carcasses of every beast which divideth the hoof
Leviticus11:27 And whatsoever goeth upon his paws
Leviticus11:28 And he that beareth the carcass of them shall wash his clothes
Leviticus11:29 These also shall be unclean unto you among the creeping things that creep upon the earth; the weasel
Leviticus11:30 And the ferret
Leviticus11:31 These are unclean to you among all that creep: whosoever doth touch them
Leviticus11:32 And upon whatsoever any of them
Leviticus11:33 And every earthen vessel
Leviticus11:34 Of all meat which may be eaten
Leviticus11:35 And every thing whereupon any part of their carcass falleth shall be unclean; whether it be oven
Leviticus11:36 Nevertheless a fountain or pit
Leviticus11:37 And if any part of their carcass fall upon any sowing seed which is to be sown
Leviticus11:38 But if any water be put upon the seed
Leviticus11:39 And if any beast
Leviticus11:40 And he that eateth of the carcass of it shall wash his clothes
Leviticus11:41 And every creeping thing that creepeth upon the earth shall be an abomination; it shall not be eaten.
Leviticus11:42 Whatsoever goeth upon the belly
Leviticus11:43 Ye shall not make yourselves abominable with any creeping thing that creepeth
Leviticus11:44 For I am the LORD your God: ye shall therefore sanctify yourselves
Leviticus11:45 For I am the LORD that bringeth you up out of the land of Egypt
Leviticus11:46 This is the law of the beasts
Leviticus11:47 To make a difference between the unclean and the clean

Leviticus13:38 If a man also or a woman have in the skin of their flesh bright spots

Leviticus13:42 And if there be in the bald head

Leviticus13:44 He is a leprous man
Leviticus13:45 And the leper in whom the plague is

Leviticus13:58 And the garment

Leviticus14:9 But it shall be on the seventh day

Leviticus14:29 And the rest of the oil that is in the priest's hand he shall put upon the head of him that is to be cleansed
Leviticus14:30 And he shall offer the one of the turtledoves
Leviticus14:31 Even such as he is able to get

Leviticus14:38 Then the priest shall go out of the house to the door of the house

Leviticus14:42 And they shall take other stones
Leviticus14:43 And if the plague come again
Leviticus14:44 Then the priest shall come and look

Leviticus14:47 And he that lieth in the house shall wash his clothes; and he that eateth in the house shall wash his clothes.

Leviticus14:49 And he shall take to cleanse the house two birds
Leviticus14:50 And he shall kill the one of the birds in an earthen vessel over running water:
Leviticus14:51 And he shall take the cedar wood
Leviticus14:52 And he shall cleanse the house with the blood of the bird
Leviticus14:53 But he shall let go the living bird out of the city into the open fields
Leviticus14:54 This is the law for all manner of plague of leprosy
Leviticus14:55 And for the leprosy of a garment
Leviticus14:56 And for a rising
Leviticus14:57 To teach when it is unclean
Leviticus15:1 And the LORD spake unto Moses and to Aaron
Leviticus15:2 Speak unto the children of Israel
Leviticus15:3 And this shall be his uncleanness in his issue: whether his flesh run with his issue
Leviticus15:4 Every bed
Leviticus15:5 And whosoever toucheth his bed shall wash his clothes
Leviticus15:6 And he that sitteth on any thing whereon he sat that hath the issue shall wash his clothes
Leviticus15:7 And he that toucheth the flesh of him that hath the issue shall wash his clothes
Leviticus15:8 And if he that hath the issue spit upon him that is clean; then he shall wash his clothes
Leviticus15:9 And what saddle soever he rideth upon that hath the issue shall be unclean.
Leviticus15:10 And whosoever toucheth any thing that was under him shall be unclean until the even: and he that beareth any of those things shall wash his clothes
Leviticus15:11 And whomsoever he toucheth that hath the issue
Leviticus15:12 And the vessel of earth
Leviticus15:13 And when he that hath an issue is cleansed of his issue; then he shall number to himself seven days for his cleansing
Leviticus15:14 And on the eighth day he shall take to him two turtledoves
Leviticus15:15 And the priest shall offer them
Leviticus15:16 And if any man's seed of copulation go out from him
Leviticus15:17 And every garment
Leviticus15:18 The woman also with whom man shall lie with seed of copulation
Leviticus15:19 And if a woman have an issue
Leviticus15:20 And every thing that she lieth upon in her separation shall be unclean: every thing also that she sitteth upon shall be unclean.
Leviticus15:21 And whosoever toucheth her bed shall wash his clothes
Leviticus15:22 And whosoever toucheth any thing that she sat upon shall wash his clothes
Leviticus15:23 And if it be on her bed
Leviticus15:24 And if any man lie with her at all
Leviticus15:25 And if a woman have an issue of her blood many days out of the time of her separation
Leviticus15:26 Every bed whereon she lieth all the days of her issue shall be unto her as the bed of her separation: and whatsoever she sitteth upon shall be unclean
Leviticus15:27 And whosoever toucheth those things shall be unclean
Leviticus15:28 But if she be cleansed of her issue
Leviticus15:29 And on the eighth day she shall take unto her two turtles
Leviticus15:30 And the priest shall offer the one for a sin offering
Leviticus15:31 Thus shall ye separate the children of Israel from their uncleanness; that they die not in their uncleanness
Leviticus15:32 This is the law of him that hath an issue
Leviticus15:33 And of her that is sick of her flowers

Leviticus18:7 The nakedness of thy father
Leviticus18:8 The nakedness of thy father's wife shalt thou not uncover: it is thy father's nakedness.
Leviticus18:9 The nakedness of thy sister
Leviticus18:10 The nakedness of thy son's daughter
Leviticus18:11 The nakedness of thy father's wife's daughter
Leviticus18:12 Thou shalt not uncover the nakedness of thy father's sister: she is thy father's near kinswoman.
Leviticus18:13 Thou shalt not uncover the nakedness of thy mother's sister: for she is thy mother's near kinswoman.
Leviticus18:14 Thou shalt not uncover the nakedness of thy father's brother
Leviticus18:15 Thou shalt not uncover the nakedness of thy daughter in law: she is thy son's wife; thou shalt not uncover her nakedness.
Leviticus18:16 Thou shalt not uncover the nakedness of thy brother's wife: it is thy brother's nakedness.
Leviticus18:17 Thou shalt not uncover the nakedness of a woman and her daughter
Leviticus18:18 Neither shalt thou take a wife to her sister
Leviticus18:19 Also thou shalt not approach unto a woman to uncover her nakedness
Leviticus18:20 Moreover thou shalt not lie carnally with thy neighbor's wife
Leviticus18:21 And thou shalt not let any of thy seed pass through the fire to Molech
Leviticus18:22 Thou shalt not lie with mankind
Leviticus18:23 Neither shalt thou lie with any beast to defile thyself therewith: neither shall any woman stand before a beast to lie down thereto: it is confusion.
Leviticus18:24 Defile not ye yourselves in any of these things: for in all these the nations are defiled which I cast out before you:
Leviticus18:25 And the land is defiled: therefore I do visit the iniquity thereof upon it
Leviticus18:26 Ye shall therefore keep my statutes and my judgments
Leviticus18:27 (For all these abominations have the men of the land done
Leviticus18:28 That the land spue not you out also
Leviticus18:29 For whosoever shall commit any of these abominations
Leviticus18:30 Therefore shall ye keep mine ordinance

Leviticus19:2 Speak unto all the congregation of the children of Israel
Leviticus19:3 Ye shall fear every man his mother
Leviticus19:4 Turn ye not unto idols
Leviticus19:5 And if ye offer a sacrifice of peace offerings unto the LORD

Leviticus19:7 And if it be eaten at all on the third day
Leviticus19:8 Therefore every one that eateth it shall bear his iniquity
Leviticus19:9 And when ye reap the harvest of your land
Leviticus19:10 And thou shalt not glean thy vineyard
Leviticus19:11 Ye shall not steal
Leviticus19:12 And ye shall not swear by my name falsely
Leviticus19:13 Thou shalt not defraud thy neighbor
Leviticus19:14 Thou shalt not curse the deaf
Leviticus19:15 Ye shall do no unrighteousness in judgment: thou shalt not respect the person of the poor
Leviticus19:16 Thou shalt not go up and down as a talebearer among thy people: neither shalt thou stand against the blood of thy neighbor; I am the LORD.
Leviticus19:17 Thou shalt not hate thy brother in thine heart: thou shalt in any wise rebuke thy neighbor
Leviticus19:18 Thou shalt not avenge
Leviticus19:19 Ye shall keep my statutes. Thou shalt not let thy cattle gender with a diverse kind: thou shalt not sow thy field with mingled seed: neither shall a garment mingled of linen and woolen come upon thee.
Leviticus19:20 And whosoever lieth carnally with a woman
Leviticus19:21 And he shall bring his trespass offering unto the LORD

Leviticus19:23 And when ye shall come into the land
Leviticus19:24 But in the fourth year all the fruit thereof shall be holy to praise the LORD withal.
Leviticus19:25 And in the fifth year shall ye eat of the fruit thereof
Leviticus19:26 Ye shall not eat any thing with the blood: neither shall ye use enchantment
Leviticus19:27 Ye shall not round the corners of your heads
Leviticus19:28 Ye shall not make any cuttings in your flesh for the dead
Leviticus19:29 Do not prostitute thy daughter
Leviticus19:30 Ye shall keep my sabbaths
Leviticus19:31 Regard not them that have familiar spirits
Leviticus19:32 Thou shalt rise up before the hoary head
Leviticus19:33 And if a stranger sojourn with thee in your land

Leviticus19:35 Ye shall do no unrighteousness in judgment
Leviticus19:36 Just balances
Leviticus19:37 Therefore shall ye observe all my statutes

Leviticus23:5 In the fourteenth day of the first month at even is the LORD's passover.
Leviticus23:6 And on the fifteenth day of the same month is the feast of unleavened bread unto the LORD: seven days ye must eat unleavened bread.
Leviticus23:7 In the first day ye shall have an holy convocation: ye shall do no servile work therein.
Leviticus23:8 But ye shall offer an offering made by fire unto the LORD seven days: in the seventh day is an holy convocation: ye shall do no servile work therein.

Leviticus23:10 Speak unto the children of Israel
Leviticus23:11 And he shall wave the sheaf before the LORD
Leviticus23:12 And ye shall offer that day when ye wave the sheaf an he lamb without blemish of the first year for a burnt offering unto the LORD.
Leviticus23:13 And the meat offering thereof shall be two tenth deals of fine flour mingled with oil
Leviticus23:14 And ye shall eat neither bread
Leviticus23:15 And ye shall count unto you from the morrow after the sabbath
Leviticus23:16 Even unto the morrow after the seventh sabbath shall ye number fifty days; and ye shall offer a new meat offering unto the LORD.
Leviticus23:17 Ye shall bring out of your habitations two wave loaves of two tenth deals; they shall be of fine flour; they shall be baked with leaven; they are the firstfruits unto the LORD.
Leviticus23:18 And ye shall offer with the bread seven lambs without blemish of the first year
Leviticus23:19 Then ye shall sacrifice one kid of the goats for a sin offering
Leviticus23:20 And the priest shall wave them with the bread of the firstfruits for a wave offering before the LORD
Leviticus23:21 And ye shall proclaim on the selfsame day
Leviticus23:22 And when ye reap the harvest of your land
Leviticus23:23 And the LORD spake unto Moses
Leviticus23:24 Speak unto the children of Israel
Leviticus23:25 Ye shall do no servile work therein: but ye shall offer an offering made by fire unto the LORD.
Leviticus23:26 And the LORD spake unto Moses
Leviticus23:27 Also on the tenth day of this seventh month there shall be a day of atonement: it shall be an holy convocation unto you; and ye shall afflict your souls
Leviticus23:28 And ye shall do no work in that same day: for it is a day of atonement
Leviticus23:29 For whatsoever soul it be that shall not be afflicted in that same day
Leviticus23:30 And whatsoever soul it be that doeth any work in that same day
Leviticus23:31 Ye shall do no manner of work: it shall be a statute for ever throughout your generations in all your dwellings.
Leviticus23:32 It shall be unto you a sabbath of rest

Leviticus23:34 Speak unto the children of Israel
Leviticus23:35 On the first day shall be an holy convocation: ye shall do no servile work therein.

Leviticus23:37 These are the feasts of the LORD
Leviticus23:38 Beside the sabbaths of the LORD
Leviticus23:39 Also in the fifteenth day of the seventh month
Leviticus23:40 And ye shall take you on the first day the boughs of goodly trees
Leviticus23:41 And ye shall keep it a feast unto the LORD seven days in the year. It shall be a statute for ever in your generations: ye shall celebrate it in the seventh month.

Leviticus25:1 And the LORD spake unto Moses in mount Sinai
Leviticus25:2 Speak unto the children of Israel
Leviticus25:3 Six years thou shalt sow thy field
Leviticus25:4 But in the seventh year shall be a sabbath of rest unto the land
Leviticus25:5 That which groweth of its own accord of thy harvest thou shalt not reap
Leviticus25:6 And the sabbath of the land shall be meat for you; for thee
Leviticus25:7 And for thy cattle
Leviticus25:8 And thou shalt number seven sabbaths of years unto thee
Leviticus25:9 Then shalt thou cause the trumpet of the jubilee to sound on the tenth day of the seventh month
Leviticus25:10 And ye shall hallow the fiftieth year
Leviticus25:11 A jubilee shall that fiftieth year be unto you: ye shall not sow
Leviticus25:12 For it is the jubilee; it shall be holy unto you: ye shall eat the increase thereof out of the field.
Leviticus25:13 In the year of this jubilee ye shall return every man unto his possession.
Leviticus25:14 And if thou sell ought unto thy neighbor
Leviticus25:15 According to the number of years after the jubilee thou shalt buy of thy neighbor
Leviticus25:16 According to the multitude of years thou shalt increase the price thereof
Leviticus25:17 Ye shall not therefore oppress one another; but thou shalt fear thy God: for I am the LORD your God.
Leviticus25:18 Wherefore ye shall do my statutes
Leviticus25:19 And the land shall yield her fruit
Leviticus25:20 And if ye shall say
Leviticus25:21 Then I will command my blessing upon you in the sixth year
Leviticus25:22 And ye shall sow the eighth year
Leviticus25:23 The land shall not be sold for ever: for the land is mine
Leviticus25:24 And in all the land of your possession ye shall grant a redemption for the land.
Leviticus25:25 If thy brother be waxen poor
Leviticus25:26 And if the man have none to redeem it
Leviticus25:27 Then let him count the years of the sale thereof
Leviticus25:28 But if he be not able to restore it to him
Leviticus25:29 And if a man sell a dwelling house in a walled city
Leviticus25:30 And if it be not redeemed within the space of a full year
Leviticus25:31 But the houses of the villages which have no wall round about them shall be counted as the fields of the country: they may be redeemed
Leviticus25:32 Notwithstanding the cities of the Levites
Leviticus25:33 And if a man purchase of the Levites
Leviticus25:34 But the field of the suburbs of their cities may not be sold; for it is their perpetual possession.
Leviticus25:35 And if thy brother be waxen poor
Leviticus25:36 Take thou no usury of him
Leviticus25:37 Thou shalt not give him thy money upon usury
Leviticus25:38 I am the LORD your God
Leviticus25:39 And if thy brother that dwelleth by thee be waxen poor
Leviticus25:40 But as an hired servant
Leviticus25:41 And then shall he depart from thee
Leviticus25:42 For they are my servants
Leviticus25:43 Thou shalt not rule over him with rigor; but shalt fear thy God.
Leviticus25:44 Both thy bondmen
Leviticus25:45 Moreover of the children of the strangers that do sojourn among you
Leviticus25:46 And ye shall take them as an inheritance for your children after you
Leviticus25:47 And if a sojourner or stranger wax rich by thee
Leviticus25:48 After that he is sold he may be redeemed again; one of his brethren may redeem him:
Leviticus25:49 Either his uncle
Leviticus25:50 And he shall reckon with him that bought him from the year that he was sold to him unto the year of jubilee: and the price of his sale shall be according unto the number of years
Leviticus25:51 If there be yet many years behind
Leviticus25:52 And if there remain but few years unto the year of jubilee
Leviticus25:53 And as a yearly hired servant shall he be with him: and the other shall not rule with rigor over him in thy sight.
Leviticus25:54 And if he be not redeemed in these years
Leviticus25:55 For unto me the children of Israel are servants; they are my servants whom I brought forth out of the land of Egypt: I am the LORD your God.
Leviticus26:1 Ye shall make you no idols nor graven image
Leviticus26:2 Ye shall keep my sabbaths
Leviticus26:3 If ye walk in my statutes
Leviticus26:4 Then I will give you rain in due season
Leviticus26:5 And your threshing shall reach unto the vintage
Leviticus26:6 And I will give peace in the land
Leviticus26:7 And ye shall chase your enemies
Leviticus26:8 And five of you shall chase an hundred
Leviticus26:9 For I will have respect unto you
Leviticus26:10 And ye shall eat old store
Leviticus26:11 And I set my tabernacle among you: and my soul shall not abhor you.
Leviticus26:12 And I will walk among you
Leviticus26:13 I am the LORD your God
Leviticus26:14 But if ye will not hearken unto me
Leviticus26:15 And if ye shall despise my statutes
Leviticus26:16 I also will do this unto you; I will even appoint over you terror
Leviticus26:17 And I will set my face against you
Leviticus26:18 And if ye will not yet for all this hearken unto me
Leviticus26:19 And I will break the pride of your power; and I will make your heaven as iron
Leviticus26:20 And your strength shall be spent in vain: for your land shall not yield her increase
Leviticus26:21 And if ye walk contrary unto me
Leviticus26:22 I will also send wild beasts among you
Leviticus26:23 And if ye will not be reformed by me by these things
Leviticus26:24 Then will I also walk contrary unto you
Leviticus26:25 And I will bring a sword upon you
Leviticus26:26 And when I have broken the staff of your bread
Leviticus26:27 And if ye will not for all this hearken unto me
Leviticus26:28 Then I will walk contrary unto you also in fury; and I
Leviticus26:29 And ye shall eat the flesh of your sons
Leviticus26:30 And I will destroy your high places
Leviticus26:31 And I will make your cities waste
Leviticus26:32 And I will bring the land into desolation: and your enemies which dwell therein shall be astonished at it.
Leviticus26:33 And I will scatter you among the heathen
Leviticus26:34 Then shall the land enjoy her sabbaths
Leviticus26:35 As long as it lieth desolate it shall rest; because it did not rest in your sabbaths
Leviticus26:36 And upon them that are left alive of you I will send a faintness into their hearts in the lands of their enemies; and the sound of a shaken leaf shall chase them; and they shall flee
Leviticus26:37 And they shall fall one upon another
Leviticus26:38 And ye shall perish among the heathen
Leviticus26:39 And they that are left of you shall pine away in their iniquity in your enemies' lands; and also in the iniquities of their fathers shall they pine away with them.
Leviticus26:40 If they shall confess their iniquity
Leviticus26:41 And that I also have walked contrary unto them
Leviticus26:42 Then will I remember my covenant with Jacob
Leviticus26:43 The land also shall be left of them
Leviticus26:44 And yet for all that
Leviticus26:45 But I will for their sakes remember the covenant of their ancestors
Leviticus26:46 These are the statutes and judgments and laws
Leviticus27:1 And the LORD spake unto Moses
Leviticus27:2 Speak unto the children of Israel
Leviticus27:3 And thy estimation shall be of the male from twenty years old even unto sixty years old
Leviticus27:4 And if it be a female
Leviticus27:5 And if it be from five years old even unto twenty years old
Leviticus27:6 And if it be from a month old even unto five years old
Leviticus27:7 And if it be from sixty years old and above; if it be a male
Leviticus27:8 But if he be poorer than thy estimation
Leviticus27:9 And if it be a beast
Leviticus27:10 He shall not alter it
Leviticus27:11 And if it be any unclean beast
Leviticus27:12 And the priest shall value it
Leviticus27:13 But if he will at all redeem it
Leviticus27:14 And when a man shall sanctify his house to be holy unto the LORD
Leviticus27:15 And if he that sanctified it will redeem his house
Leviticus27:16 And if a man shall sanctify unto the LORD some part of a field of his possession
Leviticus27:17 If he sanctify his field from the year of jubilee
Leviticus27:18 But if he sanctify his field after the jubilee
Leviticus27:19 And if he that sanctified the field will in any wise redeem it
Leviticus27:20 And if he will not redeem the field
Leviticus27:21 But the field
Leviticus27:22 And if a man sanctify unto the LORD a field which he hath bought
Leviticus27:23 Then the priest shall reckon unto him the worth of thy estimation
Leviticus27:24 In the year of the jubilee the field shall return unto him of whom it was bought
Leviticus27:25 And all thy estimations shall be according to the shekel of the sanctuary: twenty gerahs shall be the shekel.
Leviticus27:26 Only the firstling of the beasts
Leviticus27:27 And if it be of an unclean beast
Leviticus27:28 Notwithstanding no devoted thing
Leviticus27:29 None devoted
Leviticus27:30 And all the tithe of the land
Leviticus27:31 And if a man will at all redeem ought of his tithes
Leviticus27:32 And concerning the tithe of the herd
Leviticus27:33 He shall not search whether it be good or bad
Leviticus27:34 These are the commandments
Numbers1:1 And the LORD spake unto Moses in the wilderness of Sinai
Numbers1:2 Take ye the sum of all the congregation of the children of Israel
Numbers1:3 From twenty years old and upward
Numbers1:4 And with you there shall be a man of every tribe; every one head of the house of his fathers.
Numbers1:5 And these are the names of the men that shall stand with you: of the tribe of Reuben; Elizur the son of Shedeur.
Numbers1:6 Of Simeon; Shelumiel the son of Zurishaddai.
Numbers1:7 Of Judah; Nahshon the son of Amminadab.
Numbers1:8 Of Issachar; Nethaneel the son of Zuar.
Numbers1:9 Of Zebulun; Eliab the son of Helon.
Numbers1:10 Of the children of Joseph: of Ephraim; Elishama the son of Ammihud: of Manasseh; Gamaliel the son of Pedahzur.
Numbers1:11 Of Benjamin; Abidan the son of Gideoni.
Numbers1:12 Of Dan; Ahiezer the son of Ammishaddai.
Numbers1:13 Of Asher; Pagiel the son of Ocran.
Numbers1:14 Of Gad; Eliasaph the son of Deuel.
Numbers1:15 Of Naphtali; Ahira the son of Enan.
Numbers1:16 These were the renowned of the congregation
Numbers1:17 And Moses and Aaron took these men which are expressed by their names:
Numbers1:18 And they assembled all the congregation together on the first day of the second month
Numbers1:19 As the LORD commanded Moses
Numbers1:20 And the children of Reuben
Numbers1:21 Those that were numbered of them
Numbers1:22 Of the children of Simeon
Numbers1:23 Those that were numbered of them
Numbers1:24 Of the children of Gad
Numbers1:25 Those that were numbered of them
Numbers1:26 Of the children of Judah
Numbers1:27 Those that were numbered of them
Numbers1:28 Of the children of Issachar
Numbers1:29 Those that were numbered of them
Numbers1:30 Of the children of Zebulun
Numbers1:31 Those that were numbered of them
Numbers1:32 Of the children of Joseph
Numbers1:33 Those that were numbered of them
Numbers1:34 Of the children of Manasseh
Numbers1:35 Those that were numbered of them
Numbers1:36 Of the children of Benjamin
Numbers1:37 Those that were numbered of them
Numbers1:38 Of the children of Dan
Numbers1:39 Those that were numbered of them
Numbers1:40 Of the children of Asher
Numbers1:41 Those that were numbered of them
Numbers1:42 Of the children of Naphtali
Numbers1:43 Those that were numbered of them
Numbers1:44 These are those that were numbered
Numbers1:45 So were all those that were numbered of the children of Israel
Numbers1:46 Even all they that were numbered were six hundred thousand and three thousand and five hundred and fifty.
Numbers1:47 But the Levites after the tribe of their fathers were not numbered among them.
Numbers1:48 For the LORD had spoken unto Moses
Numbers1:49 Only thou shalt not number the tribe of Levi
Numbers1:50 But thou shalt appoint the Levites over the tabernacle of testimony
Numbers1:51 And when the tabernacle setteth forward
Numbers1:52 And the children of Israel shall pitch their tents
Numbers1:53 But the Levites shall pitch round about the tabernacle of testimony
Numbers1:54 And the children of Israel did according to all that the LORD commanded Moses
Numbers2:1 And the LORD spake unto Moses and unto Aaron
Numbers2:2 Every man of the children of Israel shall pitch by his own standard
Numbers2:3 And on the east side toward the rising of the sun shall they of the standard of the camp of Judah pitch throughout their armies: and Nahshon the son of Amminadab shall be captain of the children of Judah.
Numbers2:4 And his host
Numbers2:5 And those that do pitch next unto him shall be the tribe of Issachar: and Nethaneel the son of Zuar shall be captain of the children of Issachar.
Numbers2:6 And his host
Numbers2:7 Then the tribe of Zebulun: and Eliab the son of Helon shall be captain of the children of Zebulun.
Numbers2:8 And his host
Numbers2:9 All that were numbered in the camp of Judah were an hundred thousand and fourscore thousand and six thousand and four hundred
Numbers2:10 On the south side shall be the standard of the camp of Reuben according to their armies: and the captain of the children of Reuben shall be Elizur the son of Shedeur.
Numbers2:11 And his host
Numbers2:12 And those which pitch by him shall be the tribe of Simeon: and the captain of the children of Simeon shall be Shelumiel the son of Zurishaddai.
Numbers2:13 And his host
Numbers2:14 Then the tribe of Gad: and the captain of the sons of Gad shall be Eliasaph the son of Reuel.
Numbers2:15 And his host
Numbers2:16 All that were numbered in the camp of Reuben were an hundred thousand and fifty and one thousand and four hundred and fifty
Numbers2:17 Then the tabernacle of the congregation shall set forward with the camp of the Levites in the midst of the camp: as they encamp
Numbers2:18 On the west side shall be the standard of the camp of Ephraim according to their armies: and the captain of the sons of Ephraim shall be Elishama the son of Ammihud.
Numbers2:19 And his host
Numbers2:20 And by him shall be the tribe of Manasseh: and the captain of the children of Manasseh shall be Gamaliel the son of Pedahzur.
Numbers2:21 And his host
Numbers2:22 Then the tribe of Benjamin: and the captain of the sons of Benjamin shall be Abidan the son of Gideoni.
Numbers2:23 And his host
Numbers2:24 All that were numbered of the camp of Ephraim were an hundred thousand and eight thousand and an hundred
Numbers2:25 The standard of the camp of Dan shall be on the north side by their armies: and the captain of the children of Dan shall be Ahiezer the son of Ammishaddai.
Numbers2:26 And his host
Numbers2:27 And those that encamp by him shall be the tribe of Asher: and the captain of the children of Asher shall be Pagiel the son of Ocran.
Numbers2:28 And his host
Numbers2:29 Then the tribe of Naphtali: and the captain of the children of Naphtali shall be Ahira the son of Enan.
Numbers2:30 And his host
Numbers2:31 All they that were numbered in the camp of Dan were an hundred thousand and fifty and seven thousand and six hundred. They shall go hindmost with their standards.
Numbers2:32 These are those which were numbered of the children of Israel by the house of their fathers: all those that were numbered of the camps throughout their hosts were six hundred thousand and three thousand and five hundred and fifty.
Numbers2:33 But the Levites were not numbered among the children of Israel; as the LORD commanded Moses.
Numbers2:34 And the children of Israel did according to all that the LORD commanded Moses: so they pitched by their standards

Numbers3:13 Because all the firstborn are mine; for on the day that I smote all the firstborn in the land of Egypt I hallowed unto me all the firstborn in Israel

Numbers3:37 And the pillars of the court round about

Numbers3:41 And thou shalt take the Levites for me (I am the LORD) instead of all the firstborn among the children of Israel; and the cattle of the Levites instead of all the firstlings among the cattle of the children of Israel.
Numbers3:42 And Moses numbered
Numbers3:43 And all the firstborn males by the number of names

Numbers3:45 Take the Levites instead of all the firstborn among the children of Israel
Numbers3:46 And for those that are to be redeemed of the two hundred and threescore and thirteen of the firstborn of the children of Israel
Numbers3:47 Thou shalt even take five shekels apiece by the poll
Numbers3:48 And thou shalt give the money
Numbers3:49 And Moses took the redemption money of them that were over and above them that were redeemed by the Levites:
Numbers3:50 Of the firstborn of the children of Israel took he the money; a thousand three hundred and threescore and five shekels
Numbers3:51 And Moses gave the money of them that were redeemed unto Aaron and to his sons

Numbers5:1 And the LORD spake unto Moses
Numbers5:2 Command the children of Israel
Numbers5:3 Both male and female shall ye put out
Numbers5:4 And the children of Israel did so
Numbers5:5 And the LORD spake unto Moses
Numbers5:6 Speak unto the children of Israel
Numbers5:7 Then they shall confess their sin which they have done: and he shall recompense his trespass with the principal thereof
Numbers5:8 But if the man have no kinsman to recompense the trespass unto
Numbers5:9 And every offering of all the holy things of the children of Israel
Numbers5:10 And every man's hallowed things shall be his: whatsoever any man giveth the priest
Numbers5:11 And the LORD spake unto Moses
Numbers5:12 Speak unto the children of Israel
Numbers5:13 And a man lie with her carnally
Numbers5:14 And the spirit of jealousy come upon him
Numbers5:15 Then shall the man bring his wife unto the priest
Numbers5:16 And the priest shall bring her near
Numbers5:17 And the priest shall take holy water in an earthen vessel; and of the dust that is in the floor of the tabernacle the priest shall take
Numbers5:18 And the priest shall set the woman before the LORD
Numbers5:19 And the priest shall charge her by an oath
Numbers5:20 But if thou hast gone aside to another instead of thy husband
Numbers5:21 Then the priest shall charge the woman with an oath of cursing
Numbers5:22 And this water that causeth the curse shall go into thy bowels
Numbers5:23 And the priest shall write these curses in a book
Numbers5:24 And he shall cause the woman to drink the bitter water that causeth the curse: and the water that causeth the curse shall enter into her
Numbers5:25 Then the priest shall take the jealousy offering out of the woman's hand
Numbers5:26 And the priest shall take an handful of the offering
Numbers5:27 And when he hath made her to drink the water
Numbers5:28 And if the woman be not defiled
Numbers5:29 This is the law of jealousies
Numbers5:30 Or when the spirit of jealousy cometh upon him
Numbers5:31 Then shall the man be guiltless from iniquity
Numbers6:1 And the LORD spake unto Moses
Numbers6:2 Speak unto the children of Israel
Numbers6:3 He shall separate himself from wine and strong drink
Numbers6:4 All the days of his separation shall he eat nothing that is made of the vine tree
Numbers6:5 All the days of the vow of his separation there shall no razor come upon his head: until the days be fulfilled
Numbers6:6 All the days that he separateth himself unto the LORD he shall come at no dead body.
Numbers6:7 He shall not make himself unclean for his father
Numbers6:8 All the days of his separation he is holy unto the LORD.
Numbers6:9 And if any man die very suddenly by him
Numbers6:10 And on the eighth day he shall bring two turtles
Numbers6:11 And the priest shall offer the one for a sin offering
Numbers6:12 And he shall consecrate unto the LORD the days of his separation
Numbers6:13 And this is the law of the Nazarite
Numbers6:14 And he shall offer his offering unto the LORD
Numbers6:15 And a basket of unleavened bread
Numbers6:16 And the priest shall bring them before the LORD
Numbers6:17 And he shall offer the ram for a sacrifice of peace offerings unto the LORD
Numbers6:18 And the Nazarite shall shave the head of his separation at the door of the tabernacle of the congregation
Numbers6:19 And the priest shall take the sodden shoulder of the ram
Numbers6:20 And the priest shall wave them for a wave offering before the LORD: this is holy for the priest
Numbers6:21 This is the law of the Nazarite who hath vowed
Numbers6:22 And the LORD spake unto Moses
Numbers6:23 Speak unto Aaron and unto his sons
Numbers6:24 The LORD bless thee
Numbers6:25 The LORD make his face shine upon thee
Numbers6:26 The LORD lift up his countenance upon thee
Numbers6:27 And they shall put my name upon the children of Israel

Numbers7:89 And when Moses was gone into the tabernacle of the congregation to speak with him
Numbers8:1 And the LORD spake unto Moses
Numbers8:2 Speak unto Aaron and say unto him
Numbers8:3 And Aaron did so; he lighted the lamps thereof over against the candlestick
Numbers8:4 And this work of the candlestick was of beaten gold
Numbers8:5 And the LORD spake unto Moses
Numbers8:6 Take the Levites from among the children of Israel
Numbers8:7 And thus shalt thou do unto them
Numbers8:8 Then let them take a young bullock with his meat offering
Numbers8:9 And thou shalt bring the Levites before the tabernacle of the congregation: and thou shalt gather the whole assembly of the children of Israel together:
Numbers8:10 And thou shalt bring the Levites before the LORD: and the children of Israel shall put their hands upon the Levites:
Numbers8:11 And Aaron shall offer the Levites before the LORD for an offering of the children of Israel
Numbers8:12 And the Levites shall lay their hands upon the heads of the bullocks: and thou shalt offer the one for a sin offering
Numbers8:13 And thou shalt set the Levites before Aaron
Numbers8:14 Thus shalt thou separate the Levites from among the children of Israel: and the Levites shall be mine.
Numbers8:15 And after that shall the Levites go in to do the service of the tabernacle of the congregation: and thou shalt cleanse them
Numbers8:16 For they are wholly given unto me from among the children of Israel; instead of such as open every womb
Numbers8:17 For all the firstborn of the children of Israel are mine
Numbers8:18 And I have taken the Levites for all the firstborn of the children of Israel.
Numbers8:19 And I have given the Levites as a gift to Aaron and to his sons from among the children of Israel
Numbers8:20 And Moses
Numbers8:21 And the Levites were purified
Numbers8:22 And after that went the Levites in to do their service in the tabernacle of the congregation before Aaron
Numbers8:23 And the LORD spake unto Moses
Numbers8:24 This is it that belongeth unto the Levites: from twenty and five years old and upward they shall go in to wait upon the service of the tabernacle of the congregation:
Numbers8:25 And from the age of fifty years they shall cease waiting upon the service thereof
Numbers8:26 But shall minister with their brethren in the tabernacle of the congregation

Numbers9:3 In the fourteenth day of this month
Numbers9:4 And Moses spake unto the children of Israel
Numbers9:5 And they kept the passover on the fourteenth day of the first month at even in the wilderness of Sinai: according to all that the LORD commanded Moses

Numbers9:7 And those men said unto him
Numbers9:8 And Moses said unto them
Numbers9:9 And the LORD spake unto Moses
Numbers9:10 Speak unto the children of Israel

Numbers9:12 They shall leave none of it unto the morning
Numbers9:13 But the man that is clean

Numbers28:1 And the LORD spake unto Moses
Numbers28:2 Command the children of Israel
Numbers28:3 And thou shalt say unto them
Numbers28:4 The one lamb shalt thou offer in the morning
Numbers28:5 And a tenth part of an ephah of flour for a meat offering
Numbers28:6 It is a continual burnt offering
Numbers28:7 And the drink offering thereof shall be the fourth part of an hin for the one lamb: in the holy place shalt thou cause the strong wine to be poured unto the LORD for a drink offering.
Numbers28:8 And the other lamb shalt thou offer at even: as the meat offering of the morning
Numbers28:9 And on the sabbath day two lambs of the first year without spot
Numbers28:10 This is the burnt offering of every sabbath
Numbers28:11 And in the beginnings of your months ye shall offer a burnt offering unto the LORD; two young bullocks
Numbers28:12 And three tenth deals of flour for a meat offering
Numbers28:13 And a several tenth deal of flour mingled with oil for a meat offering unto one lamb; for a burnt offering of a sweet savor
Numbers28:14 And their drink offerings shall be half an hin of wine unto a bullock
Numbers28:15 And one kid of the goats for a sin offering unto the LORD shall be offered
Numbers28:16 And in the fourteenth day of the first month is the passover of the LORD.
Numbers28:17 And in the fifteenth day of this month is the feast: seven days shall unleavened bread be eaten.
Numbers28:18 In the first day shall be an holy convocation; ye shall do no manner of servile work therein:
Numbers28:19 But ye shall offer a sacrifice made by fire for a burnt offering unto the LORD; two young bullocks
Numbers28:20 And their meat offering shall be of flour mingled with oil: three tenth deals shall ye offer for a bullock
Numbers28:21 A several tenth deal shalt thou offer for every lamb
Numbers28:22 And one goat for a sin offering
Numbers28:23 Ye shall offer these beside the burnt offering in the morning
Numbers28:24 After this manner ye shall offer daily
Numbers28:25 And on the seventh day ye shall have an holy convocation; ye shall do no servile work.
Numbers28:26 Also in the day of the firstfruits
Numbers28:27 But ye shall offer the burnt offering for a sweet savor unto the LORD; two young bullocks
Numbers28:28 And their meat offering of flour mingled with oil
Numbers28:29 A several tenth deal unto one lamb
Numbers28:30 And one kid of the goats
Numbers28:31 Ye shall offer them beside the continual burnt offering
Numbers29:1 And in the seventh month
Numbers29:2 And ye shall offer a burnt offering for a sweet savor unto the LORD; one young bullock
Numbers29:3 And their meat offering shall be of flour mingled with oil
Numbers29:4 And one tenth deal for one lamb
Numbers29:5 And one kid of the goats for a sin offering
Numbers29:6 Beside the burnt offering of the month
Numbers29:7 And ye shall have on the tenth day of this seventh month an holy convocation; and ye shall afflict your souls: ye shall not do any work therein:
Numbers29:8 But ye shall offer a burnt offering unto the LORD for a sweet savor; one young bullock
Numbers29:9 And their meat offering shall be of flour mingled with oil
Numbers29:10 A several tenth deal for one lamb
Numbers29:11 One kid of the goats for a sin offering; beside the sin offering of atonement
Numbers29:12 And on the fifteenth day of the seventh month ye shall have an holy convocation; ye shall do no servile work
Numbers29:13 And ye shall offer a burnt offering
Numbers29:14 And their meat offering shall be of flour mingled with oil
Numbers29:15 And a several tenth deal to each lamb of the fourteen lambs:
Numbers29:16 And one kid of the goats for a sin offering; beside the continual burnt offering

Numbers29:18 And their meat offering and their drink offerings for the bullocks
Numbers29:19 And one kid of the goats for a sin offering; beside the continual burnt offering
Numbers29:20 And on the third day eleven bullocks
Numbers29:21 And their meat offering and their drink offerings for the bullocks
Numbers29:22 And one goat for a sin offering; beside the continual burnt offering
Numbers29:23 And on the fourth day ten bullocks

Numbers29:25 And one kid of the goats for a sin offering; beside the continual burnt offering

Numbers29:33 And their meat offering and their drink offerings for the bullocks
Numbers29:34 And one goat for a sin offering; beside the continual burnt offering
Numbers29:35 On the eighth day ye shall have a solemn assembly: ye shall do no servile work therein:
Numbers29:36 But ye shall offer a burnt offering

Numbers29:38 And one goat for a sin offering; beside the continual burnt offering

Numbers30:1 And Moses spake unto the heads of the tribes concerning the children of Israel
Numbers30:2 If a man vow a vow unto the LORD
Numbers30:3 If a woman also vow a vow unto the LORD
Numbers30:4 And her father hear her vow
Numbers30:5 But if her father disallow her in the day that he heareth; not any of her vows
Numbers30:6 And if she had at all an husband
Numbers30:7 And her husband heard it
Numbers30:8 But if her husband disallowed her on the day that he heard it; then he shall make her vow which she vowed
Numbers30:9 But every vow of a widow
Numbers30:10 And if she vowed in her husband's house
Numbers30:11 And her husband heard it
Numbers30:12 But if her husband hath utterly made them void on the day he heard them; then whatsoever proceeded out of her lips concerning her vows
Numbers30:13 Every vow
Numbers30:14 But if her husband altogether hold his peace at her from day to day; then he establisheth all her vows
Numbers30:15 But if he shall any ways make them void after that he hath heard them; then he shall bear her iniquity.
Numbers30:16 These are the statutes

Numbers35:1 And the LORD spake unto Moses in the plains of Moab by Jordan near Jericho
Numbers35:2 Command the children of Israel
Numbers35:3 And the cities shall they have to dwell in; and the suburbs of them shall be for their cattle
Numbers35:4 And the suburbs of the cities
Numbers35:5 And ye shall measure from without the city on the east side two thousand cubits
Numbers35:6 And among the cities which ye shall give unto the Levites there shall be six cities for refuge
Numbers35:7 So all the cities which ye shall give to the Levites shall be forty and eight cities: them shall ye give with their suburbs.
Numbers35:8 And the cities which ye shall give shall be of the possession of the children of Israel: from them that have many ye shall give many; but from them that have few ye shall give few: every one shall give of his cities unto the Levites according to his inheritance which he inheriteth.
Numbers35:9 And the LORD spake unto Moses
Numbers35:10 Speak unto the children of Israel
Numbers35:11 Then ye shall appoint you cities to be cities of refuge for you; that the slayer may flee thither
Numbers35:12 And they shall be unto you cities for refuge from the avenger; that the manslayer die not
Numbers35:13 And of these cities which ye shall give six cities shall ye have for refuge.
Numbers35:14 Ye shall give three cities on this side Jordan
Numbers35:15 These six cities shall be a refuge
Numbers35:16 And if he smite him with an instrument of iron
Numbers35:17 And if he smite him with throwing a stone
Numbers35:18 Or if he smite him with an hand weapon of wood
Numbers35:19 The revenger of blood himself shall slay the murderer: when he meeteth him
Numbers35:20 But if he thrust him of hatred
Numbers35:21 Or in enmity smite him with his hand
Numbers35:22 But if he thrust him suddenly without enmity
Numbers35:23 Or with any stone
Numbers35:24 Then the congregation shall judge between the slayer and the revenger of blood according to these judgments:
Numbers35:25 And the congregation shall deliver the slayer out of the hand of the revenger of blood
Numbers35:26 But if the slayer shall at any time come without the border of the city of his refuge
Numbers35:27 And the revenger of blood find him without the borders of the city of his refuge
Numbers35:28 Because he should have remained in the city of his refuge until the death of the high priest: but after the death of the high priest the slayer shall return into the land of his possession.
Numbers35:29 So these things shall be for a statute of judgment unto you throughout your generations in all your dwellings.
Numbers35:30 Whoso killeth any person
Numbers35:31 Moreover ye shall take no satisfaction for the life of a murderer
Numbers35:32 And ye shall take no satisfaction for him that is fled to the city of his refuge
Numbers35:33 So ye shall not pollute the land wherein ye are: for blood it defileth the land: and the land cannot be cleansed of the blood that is shed therein
Numbers35:34 Defile not therefore the land which ye shall inhabit

Deuteronomy1:1 These be the words which Moses spake unto all Israel on this side Jordan in the wilderness
Deuteronomy1:2 (There are eleven days' journey from Horeb by the way of mount Seir unto Kadeshbarnea.)
Deuteronomy1:3 And it came to pass in the fortieth year
Deuteronomy1:4 After he had slain Sihon the king of the Amorites
Deuteronomy1:5 On this side Jordan
Deuteronomy1:6 The LORD our God spake unto us in Horeb
Deuteronomy1:7 Turn you
Deuteronomy1:8 Behold
Deuteronomy1:9 And I spake unto you at that time
Deuteronomy1:10 The LORD your God hath multiplied you
Deuteronomy1:11 (The LORD God of your fathers make you a thousand times so many more as ye are
Deuteronomy1:12 How can I myself alone bear your cumbrance
Deuteronomy1:13 Take you wise men
Deuteronomy1:14 And ye answered me
Deuteronomy1:15 So I took the chief of your tribes
Deuteronomy1:16 And I charged your judges at that time
Deuteronomy1:17 Ye shall not respect persons in judgment; but ye shall hear the small as well as the great; ye shall not be afraid of the face of man; for the judgment is God's: and the cause that is too hard for you
Deuteronomy1:18 And I commanded you at that time all the things which ye should do.
Deuteronomy1:19 And when we departed from Horeb
Deuteronomy1:20 And I said unto you
Deuteronomy1:21 Behold
Deuteronomy1:22 And ye came near unto me every one of you
Deuteronomy1:23 And the saying pleased me well: and I took twelve men of you
Deuteronomy1:24 And they turned and went up into the mountain
Deuteronomy1:25 And they took of the fruit of the land in their hands
Deuteronomy1:26 Notwithstanding ye would not go up
Deuteronomy1:27 And ye murmured in your tents
Deuteronomy1:28 Whither shall we go up? our brethren have discouraged our heart

Judges20:41 And when the men of Israel turned again

Judges20:43 Thus they inclosed the Benjamites round about
Judges20:44 And there fell of Benjamin eighteen thousand men; all these were men of valor.

Judges20:46 So that all which fell that day of Benjamin were twenty and five thousand men that drew the sword; all these were men of valor.

2Samuel22:1 And David spake unto the LORD the words of this song in the day that the LORD had delivered him out of the hand of all his enemies
2Samuel22:2 And he said
2Samuel22:3 The God of my rock; in him will I trust: he is my shield
2Samuel22:4 I will call on the LORD
2Samuel22:5 When the waves of death compassed me
2Samuel22:6 The sorrows of hell compassed me about; the snares of death prevented me;
2Samuel22:7 In my distress I called upon the LORD
2Samuel22:8 Then the earth shook and trembled; the foundations of heaven moved and shook
2Samuel22:9 There went up a smoke out of his nostrils
2Samuel22:10 He bowed the heavens also
2Samuel22:11 And he rode upon a cherub
2Samuel22:12 And he made darkness pavilions round about him
2Samuel22:13 Through the brightness before him were coals of fire kindled.
2Samuel22:14 The LORD thundered from heaven
2Samuel22:15 And he sent out arrows
2Samuel22:16 And the channels of the sea appeared
2Samuel22:17 He sent from above
2Samuel22:18 He delivered me from my strong enemy
2Samuel22:19 They prevented me in the day of my calamity: but the LORD was my stay.
2Samuel22:20 He brought me forth also into a large place: he delivered me
2Samuel22:21 The LORD rewarded me according to my righteousness: according to the cleanness of my hands hath he recompensed me.
2Samuel22:22 For I have kept the ways of the LORD
2Samuel22:23 For all his judgments were before me: and as for his statutes
2Samuel22:24 I was also upright before him
2Samuel22:25 Therefore the LORD hath recompensed me according to my righteousness; according to my cleanness in his eye sight.
2Samuel22:26 With the merciful thou wilt show thyself merciful
2Samuel22:27 With the pure thou wilt show thyself pure; and with the froward thou wilt show thyself unsavory.
2Samuel22:28 And the afflicted people thou wilt save: but thine eyes are upon the haughty
2Samuel22:29 For thou art my lamp
2Samuel22:30 For by thee I have run through a troop: by my God have I leaped over a wall.
2Samuel22:31 As for God
2Samuel22:32 For who is God
2Samuel22:33 God is my strength and power: and he maketh my way perfect.
2Samuel22:34 He maketh my feet like hinds' feet: and setteth me upon my high places.
2Samuel22:35 He teacheth my hands to war; so that a bow of steel is broken by mine arms.
2Samuel22:36 Thou hast also given me the shield of thy salvation: and thy gentleness hath made me great.
2Samuel22:37 Thou hast enlarged my steps under me; so that my feet did not slip.
2Samuel22:38 I have pursued mine enemies
2Samuel22:39 And I have consumed them
2Samuel22:40 For thou hast girded me with strength to battle: them that rose up against me hast thou subdued under me.
2Samuel22:41 Thou hast also given me the necks of mine enemies
2Samuel22:42 They looked
2Samuel22:43 Then did I beat them as small as the dust of the earth
2Samuel22:44 Thou also hast delivered me from the strivings of my people
2Samuel22:45 Strangers shall submit themselves unto me: as soon as they hear
2Samuel22:46 Strangers shall fade away
2Samuel22:47 The LORD liveth; and blessed be my rock; and exalted be the God of the rock of my salvation.
2Samuel22:48 It is God that avengeth me
2Samuel22:49 And that bringeth me forth from mine enemies: thou also hast lifted me up on high above them that rose up against me: thou hast delivered me from the violent man.
2Samuel22:50 Therefore I will give thanks unto thee
2Samuel22:51 He is the tower of salvation for his king: and sheweth mercy to his anointed
